## Summary

-

## Change Type

- [ ] Product/UI behavior
- [ ] Runtime, renderer, or model format behavior
- [ ] Viewer API, action, prop, or tracking behavior
- [ ] Provider/plugin integration
- [ ] Documentation, governance, or repository metadata
- [ ] Tests, CI, release, or developer tooling

## Public Surface

- [ ] No public API, schema, CLI, IPC, or file-format change
- [ ] Public API/schema change is documented and additive, not breaking
- [ ] Public API/schema change is documented and intentionally breaking
- [ ] Migration or compatibility impact is described below

Migration or compatibility notes:

-

## Validation

- [ ] `npm run check:quality`
- [ ] `npm run check:quality:e2e-workflow-record` for release-facing or workflow-sensitive changes
- [ ] Focused unit/integration tests for the touched package
- [ ] Relevant Playwright project, if UI or workflow behavior changed
- [ ] Screenshot or recording attached for visible UI changes

Skipped checks, with reason:

-

## Security / Privacy / IP

- [ ] No secrets, private assets, model weights, or unreviewed generated media added
- [ ] Untrusted input is validated before use
- [ ] Electron IPC, file paths, external URLs, and provider responses are scoped and validated where relevant
- [ ] Viewer API changes preserve disabled-by-default, loopback-only, scoped-permission, user-mediated behavior
- [ ] Provider changes stay behind provider/plugin boundaries and document license/distribution impact
- [ ] No new trademark, patent-sensitive, or third-party asset wording without documentation review

## Docs / Localization / Accessibility

- [ ] User-visible strings are localized or intentionally locale-neutral
- [ ] README/docs/specs are updated when behavior or public surface changes
- [ ] Keyboard, focus, contrast, and reduced-motion behavior were considered for UI changes

## DCO

- [ ] I certify that I have the right to submit this contribution under the repository license and each commit includes a DCO `Signed-off-by:` line.

## Follow-up Risks

Known limitations, deferred checks, or review areas:

-
